sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72408" key="oi)ktrologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκτρο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72408.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piteous discourse,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.124</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.22</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
